subcodes.first_line: O friend!  Many a day hath passed, and still the sweet fragrance of thy faithfulness hath failed to reach Us.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حبیب قد مضی ایام و ماوجدنا من جنابک روایح طیب الوفا ا نسیت الذی انک ان
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @spiritual transformation, @mystical themes, @call to action, @consolation and comfort
